publishedAbstract: When trying to PUT an object to a noobaa S3 service via Camel (or AWS-SDK), the following error is shown: ``` "Failed delivery for (MessageId: 123456789ABCDEF-0000000000000001 on ExchangeId: 1234567889ABCDE-0000000000000001). Exhausted after delivery attempt: 1 caught: software.amazon.awssdk.services.s3.model.S3Exception: The Content-MD5 you specified is not valid. (Service: S3, Status Code: 400, Request ID: abc1defg-hijklm-a1b, Extended Request ID: abc1defg-hijklm-a1b) (SDK Attempt Count: 1) ```
publishedTitle: Camel/AWS-SDK upload to noobaa: The Content-MD5 you specified is not valid
